"'''Number Two in the Galaxy'''" is a ten-page comic featured in [[Star Wars Tales 18|''Star Wars Tales'' #18'']], written by [[Henry Gilroy]], and illustrated by [[Todd Demong]].

==Plot summary==
[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] comes to get his armor repaired on the remote planet of [[Ma'ar Shaddam/Legends|Ma'ar Shaddam]]. While he is not wearing it, a group of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] attempt to kill him. Dressed only in a robe, he tricks some of the hunters into killing each other. He kills another barehanded and steals the dead being's blade. The ringleader of the hunters steals Fett's [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]] and [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. Using the ship's cannons, he blasts the facility that Fett is in. Believing he killed Fett, he goes to a nearby cantina, impersonating him. Fett comes in wearing [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango's]] old armor and takes his armor back, but leaves the impersonator alive to remember who is number one.
